_comment: Import into your GTM web container: Admin > Import Container > choose this file > Workspace: Existing/New > Merge (Overwrite conflicting). REPLACE the two placeholders before publishing: AW-CONVERSION_ID and CONVERSION_LABEL come from the Google Ads conversion action you create (Tools > Conversions > + New > Website OR Import). See ../README.md.

tag.name: Google Ads - Conversion Linker
tag.notes: Reads and stores the gclid so conversions (and offline imports) attribute correctly. Fires on all pages.

tag.name: Google Ads - Lead Conversion (generate_lead)
tag.notes: Fires when the LP lead form pushes generate_lead (form submit). Secondary signal — many visitors chat without submitting the form.

tag.name: Google Ads - Chat Started Conversion (tawk_chat_started)
tag.notes: Fires on the tawk_chat_started dataLayer event from TawkToScript.tsx (registered beforeInteractive, before the Tawk widget loads). PRIMARY signal for the chat-first LPs — captures visitors who open chat without ever filling the form. Includes some junk (WordPress.com billing); qualify downstream and use offline import for revenue.

trigger.name: CE - generate_lead
trigger.notes: Matches the dataLayer.push({ event: 'generate_lead', ... }) fired by components/lp/LpLeadForm.tsx on successful submit.

trigger.name: CE - tawk_chat_started
trigger.notes: Matches the dataLayer.push({ event: 'tawk_chat_started', ... }) fired by components/integrations/TawkToScript.tsx when a Tawk chat begins.

variable.name: DLV - lead_source
variable.notes: e.g. wordpress_help_support_lp / fix_wordpress_errors_lp. Use to segment conversions per campaign in GA4/Looker.
